name: ElitePodSystem – Smart facial treatment system with AI skin analysis
shortDescription: 4-in-1 premium platform: oxygen activation (Bohr), TriPolar RF, ultrasonic active-ingredient delivery and vibrational revitalization – with built-in skin analysis camera.
description: The ElitePodSystem™ is not just a cosmetic device – it is a revolutionary, multifunctional skin renewal platform that combines the most advanced technologies in a single premium device. The system combines innovative oxygen activation technology, radiofrequency, ultrasonic active-ingredient delivery and real-time skin analysis to ensure that every treatment delivers personalized, spectacular and immediate results.
metaTitle: ElitePodSystem | 4-in-1 smart facial treatment system with AI skin analysis
metaDescription: ElitePodSystem™ – Oxygen activation, TriPolar RF, ultrasound and vibrational revitalization in a single premium device with built-in AI skin analysis. Glass skin effect.

videoDescription.headline: ElitePodSystem – The new generation of intelligent skin renewal
paragraphs: The ElitePodSystem™ is a revolutionary, multifunctional skin renewal platform that combines the most advanced technologies in a single premium device. Oxygen activation, TriPolar radiofrequency, ultrasonic active-ingredient delivery and vibrational revitalization – all complemented by built-in, AI-powered skin analysis.
More than a treatment. It is an experience: instant skin glow, finer texture, deep hydration and the much-loved "glass skin" effect from the very first session.

afterVideo.text: Do you have questions about ElitePodSystem? We are happy to help!

final.headline: Interested in the ElitePodSystem smart facial treatment system?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we will help you decide whether this is the best choice for your salon.

featureRows.headline: Why choose ElitePodSystem?
featureRows.subtitle: 4 premium technologies, intelligent skin analysis, glass skin effect – in a single device.

features.title: 4-in-1 premium technology
features.description:
ElitePodSystem™ unites four advanced skin renewal technologies in a single device, covering the full spectrum of facial treatments.

Integrated modules:

Oxygen activation (Bohr technology)
TriPolar radiofrequency
Ultrasonic active-ingredient delivery
Vibrational revitalization
features.highlight: More services in a single device – higher treatment prices.

features.title: Intelligent skin analysis – because true beauty is personal
features.description:
Through built-in precision sensors and diagnostic functions, the device builds an in-depth picture of the current condition of the skin – not based on superficial impressions, but on real data. The result of the analysis is a perfectly personalized treatment protocol.
Skin hydration level measurement
Sebum balance analysis
Skin structure and overall condition assessment
Data-driven, personalized protocol
features.highlight: A conscious, personal and truly luxurious experience.

features.title: Oxygen activation (Bohr technology) + TriPolar RF
features.description: The oxygen activation module increases skin oxygenation through CO₂ stimulation, triggers cellular revitalization and results in more radiant, livelier skin. The TriPolar radiofrequency module firms, stimulates collagen and reduces wrinkles – all painlessly, with a relaxing experience.

features.title: Ultrasonic active-ingredient delivery and vibrational revitalization
features.description: The ultrasound module ensures deeper penetration and maximized utilization of active ingredients, so cosmetic serums truly work as intended. The vibration unit boosts microcirculation and offers a relaxing massage experience for the client.

features.title: Fully customizable treatments
features.description:
Through the combination of touchscreen control, real-time parameter adjustment and treatment protocols, every client receives an exclusive, tailored experience.

Treatment areas and programs:

Face, neck, décolleté
Revitalizing program
Glow-boosting program
Regenerating program
features.highlight: Ideal for all skin types – occasional, course-based and premium packages.

training.headline: Training – confident knowledge, professional level
training.intro: When you purchase ElitePodSystem™, you get not just a device – but a complete, immediately applicable knowledge package. The full machine-operator training presents the device's operation step by step and provides a confident foundation for everyday use.
items: Detailed presentation of how the device works
Clear overview of each treatment option
Detailed course material and worked-out treatment protocols
Sample client documentation and educational materials
Use of data-driven operation and touchscreen control
closingParagraphs: Based on our experience, the basic training is fully sufficient to enable you to use the device independently, with confident knowledge and at a professional level.
Premium hands-on training with a live model is also available on request, in a real treatment setting and with professional guidance.
training.freeText: Basic training is FREE with the purchase of the device!

expertQuote.quote: ElitePodSystem is special because it brings the four most important facial treatment technologies together in a single device, and thanks to the built-in skin analysis every treatment is truly personalized. The client immediately sees and understands the change – this is the next level of conscious skincare.
expertQuote.author: Gaszler Simonetta

functionCards.name: Oxygen activation
functionCards.description: Bohr technology, CO₂ stimulation, cellular revitalization.

functionCards.name: AI skin analysis
functionCards.description: Built-in camera, real data, personalized protocol.

faq.question: What does 4-in-1 technology mean?
faq.answer: ElitePodSystem™ unites four advanced skin renewal technologies in a single device: oxygen activation (Bohr technology), TriPolar radiofrequency, ultrasonic active-ingredient delivery and vibrational revitalization. So with a single machine you can offer the full premium facial treatment range.

faq.question: How does the built-in skin analysis work?
faq.answer: The precision sensors and built-in skin analysis camera measure the skin's hydration level, sebum production and overall structural condition in real time. Based on the data, the device automatically suggests a personalized treatment protocol.

faq.question: What areas can it be used on?
faq.answer: Face, neck and décolleté. Three main programs are available: revitalizing, glow-boosting and regenerating. Ideal for all skin types, suitable for one-off treatments, course-based programs and premium service packages alike.

faq.question: What results can be expected?
faq.answer: Visible already after the first treatment: instant skin glow and radiance, finer skin texture, deep hydration, more uniform complexion and a fresher, youthful appearance. Our goal is the much-loved "glass skin" effect.

faq.question: What are the technical specifications?
faq.answer: Model: AM183, weight ~6.4 kg, power supply DC 24V, power 12W. Operating temperature: 5–30 °C, humidity: 20%–80%. Compact, premium-quality housing – ideal in a salon environment.

faq.question: What training and warranty do you provide?
faq.answer: The price of the device includes the full machine-operator basic training, detailed course material, treatment protocols and sample client documentation. On request, live-model practical training is also available (+59,990 Ft). We provide a 2-year full warranty and a replacement device during repair.

whatsIncluded: Detailed course material and treatment protocols
